buildCommand: set -e; npm install --prefix admin-panel && npm run build --prefix admin-panel || echo 'admin-panel build failed'; npm install --prefix pix-direct-sales-main && npm run build --prefix pix-direct-sales-main; if [ -d admin-panel/dist ]; then mkdir -p pix-direct-sales-main/dist/admin && cp -r admin-panel/dist/* pix-direct-sales-main/dist/admin/; fi
